game_name: Boogerman: A Pick and Flick Adventure

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational mechanic used throughout all levels
Primary offensive tool for defeating enemies
Alternative offensive tool with distinct properties
Resource management; cape color indicates health state (red=full, yellow=damaged)
Spatial navigation aid and progress markers
Unique enemy types per level; defeat required to progress
Slight puzzle elements required to reach level exit
Ultimate challenge; culmination of all learned skills

typical_relief_triggers: Unlocking sandbox credit scroll with unlimited fuel
typical_tension_triggers: Health depletion (cape color change from red to yellow)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension-relief pattern with escalating difficulty; each level builds to boss encounter followed by reward sequence (sandbox playable credits)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to ammunition types and basic platforming mechanics in safe contexts
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy encounters and level-specific boss battles with increasing complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final boss (BoogerMiester) represents ultimate challenge; originally designed as character concept before becoming primary antagonist
notable_spikes: First level boss encounter (transition from exploration to combat)
Final boss battle (culmination of all game mechanics)
Level design complexity increases with vertical and horizontal navigation demands

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level presents spatial exploration with platforming challenges, culminating in a unique boss battle with level-specific enemy design
Levels require movement in multiple directions (up/down/left/right) and transitions between distant areas, creating spatial complexity
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Referenced as extensive and challenging level design across game

notable_level_patterns.description: Post-boss playable credit scroll with unlimited fuel for fly-fart mechanic; provides relief and reward after intense boss encounter
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final sequence after each level completion

sources_used: Wikipedia: Boogerman - A Pick and Flick Adventure (Gameplay section, Development interview, Reception section)
The Cutting Room Floor: Boogerman SNES (Level and Cutscene Select documentation, Restoration features)
